testcase.name: generate_acs_summary::generate_acs_summary.py::file_exists
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/generate_acs_summary.py suite=generate_acs_summary phase=case type=file_exists warning=False message=File exists

testcase.name: generate_acs_summary::generate_acs_summary.py::python_compiles
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/generate_acs_summary.py suite=generate_acs_summary phase=case type=py_compile warning=False message=Python compilation succeeded

testcase.name: generate_acs_summary::generate_acs_summary.py::has_main_guard
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/generate_acs_summary.py suite=generate_acs_summary phase=case type=main_guard warning=False message=Main guard found

testcase.name: generate_acs_summary::generate_acs_summary.py::cli_requires_many_inputs
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/generate_acs_summary.py suite=generate_acs_summary phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/generate_acs_summary.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 2 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR --- usage: generate_acs_summary.py [-h] [--merged_json MERGED_JSON] [--acs_config_path ACS_CONFIG_PATH] [--system_config_path SYSTEM_CONFIG_PATH] [--uefi_version_log UEFI_VERSION_LOG] [--device_tree_dts DEVICE_TREE_DTS] [--acs_info_json ACS_INFO_JSON] bsa_summary_path sbsa_summary_path fwts_summary_path sct_summary_path bbsr_fwts_summary_path bbsr_sct_summary_path bbsr_tpm_summary_path pfdi_summary_path post_script_summary_path standalone_summary_path OS_tests_summary_path capsule_update_summary_path sbmr_ib_summary_path sbmr_oob_summary_path scmi_summary_path output_html_path generate_acs_summary.py: error: the following arguments are required: bsa_summary_path, sbsa_summary_path, fwts_summary_path, sct_summary_path, bbsr_fwts_summary_path, bbsr_sct_summary_path, bbsr_tpm_summary_path, pfdi_summary_path, post_script_summary_path, standalone_summary_path, OS_tests_summary_path, capsule_update_summary_path, sbmr_ib_summary_path, sbmr_oob_summary_path, scmi_summary_path, output_html_path

post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/generate_acs_summary/generate_acs_summary/10_capsule_summary_is_merged_into_standalone_section/summary.html contains
